# Simple Variable Declaration

Basic scalar variable declaration with assignment

```perl
my $name = "example";
my $count = 42;
```

# Expected Compilation Outcomes

## Clean Perl Output

```perl
use v5.36;
my $name = "example";
my $count = 42;
```

## Typed Perl Output

```perl
my $name = "example";
my $count = 42;
```

## Inferred Perl Output

```perl
# Type inference not yet fully implemented
```
